testcase.name: test_create_travel_request_draft
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_travel_requests.py:92: in test_create_travel_request_draft assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_15_day_policy_short_notice_without_explanation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for short notice without explanation, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_travel_requests.py:159: in test_15_day_policy_short_notice_without_explanation assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for short notice without explanation, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for short notice without explanation, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
